dashboard.title: Receptionist Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Manage visitor check-ins, walk-in registrations, and daily operations

scanner.title: QR Code Scanner
scanner.description: Scan visitor QR codes for quick check-in. Click the button below to open the scanner.
scanner.modalDescription: Point your camera at the visitor's QR code

errorDetails.tooEarly: This invitation is scheduled for a future time. Check-in is allowed starting 2 hours before the scheduled time.
errorDetails.expired: This invitation has expired and can no longer be used for check-in.
errorDetails.notFound: The scanned QR code does not match any invitation in the system.
errorDetails.notApproved: This invitation must be approved before check-in is allowed.
errorDetails.alreadyCheckedIn: This visitor has already been checked in.

walkIn.captureSubtitle: Take a photo of the visitor for their profile
walkIn.photoCapturedSubtitle: Start the registration form when you are ready.

activeVisitors.noActiveVisitorsDesc: Visitors will appear here when they check in.

documents.scanningLocal: Scan documents that will be saved locally
documents.scanSubtitle: Use your device camera to scan visitor documents like IDs, passports, or other required paperwork
documents.noDocuments: No documents available for this visitor.

notifications.overdueMessage: {{count}} visitor{{plural}} has exceeded their scheduled checkout time.
notifications.overdueMessage_one: {{count}} visitor has exceeded their scheduled checkout time.
notifications.overdueMessage_other: {{count}} visitors have exceeded their scheduled checkout time.
notifications.overdueClearedDesc: All overdue visitors have checked out.

toasts.reportDownloadedDesc: The in-building report has been downloaded successfully.
toasts.unableToExport: Unable to export the report right now.
toasts.faceDetectionUnavailable: Face detection is currently unavailable. Proceeding without validation.
toasts.noFaceDetectedDesc: No face was detected in the captured photo. Please retake the photo with a clearly visible face.
toasts.returningVisitorDesc: Welcome back, {{name}}! Your information has been pre-filled.
toasts.faceDetectedDesc: Face detected successfully! Proceeding to registration form.
toasts.photoUploadedDesc: Face detected successfully. Face recognition is enabled for this visitor.
toasts.photoUploadFailedDesc: The visitor was created but without a photo.
toasts.walkInSuccessDesc: {{name}} has been {{action}} successfully. Host {{host}} has been notified.
toasts.checkInRequiresApprovalDesc: Visitor registered successfully but requires approval before check-in.
toasts.checkOutSuccessDesc: Visitor has been checked out successfully.
toasts.photoUploadFailedDefault: Failed to upload the profile photo.

systemNotes.walkInImmediateCheckIn: Walk-in visitor - immediate check-in by receptionist

step1.title: Find Visitor
step1.subtitle: Search by phone or email to check if visitor exists
step1.noVisitorFoundDesc: Create a new visitor profile for this walk-in
step1.pendingInvitationDesc: This visitor has {{count}} pending invitation{{plural}} awaiting approval.
step1.pendingInvitationDesc_one: This visitor has {{count}} pending invitation awaiting approval.
step1.pendingInvitationDesc_other: This visitor has {{count}} pending invitations awaiting approval.

step2.title: Visitor Details
step2.photoNote: This picture will be stored as the visitor's profile photo. Need a retake? Go back and choose "Start with Photo Capture".
step2.noDocumentsScanned: No documents scanned yet. Scan ID or other documents for verification.
step2.updateNote: Changes will update the existing visitor profile.

step3.title: Visit Information
step3.subtitle: Where is the visitor going and why?
step3.hostProvisioningIdentifierMissing: Unable to add this host because no directory identifier is available.
step3.hostProvisioningSuccess: {{name}} is now available as a host.
step3.hostProvisioningFailed: Failed to add host from directory.
step3.hostBusyHint: They may not be immediately available.
step3.hostStatusUnavailable: Unable to verify the host's current availability right now.
step3.hostBusyConfirmHint: Do you still want to continue with check-in and print the badge?

walkInForm.returningVisitorDesc: Information has been pre-filled. Please verify and update if needed.

invitationModal.unableToProcess: Unable to process check-in at this time.
invitationModal.notFoundDesc: The scanned QR code does not match any invitation in the system.
invitationModal.tooEarlyDesc: This visitor is arriving too early.
invitationModal.earlyArrivalAllowed: They can be checked in now, but please notify the host that the visitor has arrived early.
invitationModal.lateCheckInInfo: What happens when you check in:
invitationModal.lateCheckInBullet1: Visitor's expected end time will be recalculated based on the scheduled duration
invitationModal.lateCheckInBullet2: Overstay notifications will use the adjusted end time
invitationModal.lateCheckInBullet3: Please contact the host to confirm the visitor's arrival
invitationModal.notApprovedDesc: This invitation must be approved before check-in is allowed.
invitationModal.alreadyCheckedInDesc: This visitor has already been checked in at {{time}}
invitationModal.name: Name
invitationModal.checkInNotesPlaceholder: Add any notes about this check-in...

checkInForm.searchVisitorsPlaceholder: Search by name, email, company, or subject...
checkInForm.invitationNotFound: Invitation not found. Please check the number and try again.
checkInForm.alreadyCheckedIn: This visitor is already checked in.
checkInForm.notApproved: This invitation is not approved for check-in.
checkInForm.outsideWindow: This invitation is not within the scheduled time window.
checkInForm.notesPlaceholder: Add any notes about the check-in process...
checkInForm.instructionByNumber: Enter the invitation number to search for a specific invitation.
checkInForm.instructionByVisitor: Search for visitors by name, email, company, or invitation subject.

qrScanner.tips: Tips: Hold QR code steady within the finder box
qrScanner.manualPlaceholder: Scan with hardware scanner or type manually...
qrScanner.hardwareScannerTip: Hardware QR scanners are supported - just scan and press Enter
qrScanner.cameraInstruction: Position the QR code within the finder box. Detection is automatic with beep sound.
qrScanner.manualInstruction: Enter the QR code data or invitation number manually. You can find this on the visitor's invitation or printed badge.
qrScanner.enterCode: Please enter a QR code or invitation number
qrScanner.cameraPermissionDenied: Camera permission denied. Please allow camera access.
